systems.system_notes: Long cephalomedullary proximal femoral nailing platform anchored to the official Stryker Gamma4 product family materials.

trays.tray_notes: Official Gamma4 materials support dedicated long-nail instrumentation and integrated fracture fixation workflow.

components.component_notes: Primary long Gamma4 nail component described within the official Gamma4 hip fracture nailing platform.
The Gamma4 construct includes proximal lag screw fixation options.
The Gamma4 long nail construct includes distal locking fixation options.
End-cap compatibility is part of the Gamma4 long nail construct family.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The public Gamma4 source set confirms the long nail family but this pass does not include a clean long-nail implant code matrix.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper IFU or sterile implant listing pass is needed for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
